content: Dagster pitfalls: IO managers unsuitable for SQL-heavy or large-dataset pipelines; asset naming must align with storage conventions; resources must be centralized not duplicated; external assets via Pipes need full protocol implementation for observability; multi_asset triggers entire function on any output materialization; code_version needed for change tracking; partition mappings must be explicit between differently-partitioned assets; backfills without concurrency limits overwhelm infrastructure.
